message:
refactor(events): optimize oldest_lag_ms with queue length awareness

Fix stale lag measurements when queue is empty by accepting queued_len
parameter. When no messages are buffered, return immediately instead
of measuring timestamps from already-consumed messages.

- Refactor stats() to extract queue lengths into variables before use
- Update oldest_lag_ms() signature to accept queued_len parameter
- Add early return when queued_len == 0
- Use saturating_sub to correctly index into ring buffer

Tests: stats_clear_oldest_lag_when_queue_is_drained,
oldest_lag_uses_oldest_buffered_timestamp

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
